MINI MINUTES:

Glen Carolo, Telephone (925) 787-1193, appearing in Pro Per;

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Montgomery Technologies, Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Glen Carolo, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Agustin R. Pina, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Montgomery Technologies, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Greg Jones, President of plaintiff Montgomery Technologies, LLC, a California limited liability company, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Glen Carolo, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 13, 2018.
Notice and Acknowledgment of Receipt of Summons & Complaint was mailed to defendant on April 25, 2018.
Defendant mailed the Receipt & Acknowledgment of Summons & Complaint on May 1, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on June 18, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 18, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Montgomery Technologies, LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Glen Carolo, an individual, as follows:

Damages - $58,159.03.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $450.00.

Total - $61,434.03.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Continued To Oct-03-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
